title: Customer Success & Account Intelligence
guardrails: Packets are advisory: CRM updates, quote and opportunity edits, shipment reschedules, invoice settlements, and customer replies remain human-approved outside this sprint.
Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never post to CRM, send email, or mutate commercial records silently.

steps: Sign in with CRM, orders, reports, Control Tower, or invoice audit edit access.
Open /assistant/customer-success-account-intelligence and click Create Sprint 18 packet.
Confirm AssistantCustomerSuccessPacket persists with accountScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without CRM or shipment mutations.

steps: Queue customer success command review with optional note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and audit answerKind sprint18_cs_rev recorded.

steps: Approve packet after CS leadership sign-off.
Verify sprint18_cs_ok audit narrative denies automatic CRM posts or messaging.
scenarios.passWhen: Status APPROVED; source CRM/brief/shipment records unchanged.
